budget.linear_scan_regression_guard: segment candidate visits must stay far below one full segment scan per mapped diagnostic lookup

notes: The focused source mapper test builds many one-line expanded-source segments.
It verifies deterministic source-unit mapping while checking indexed lookup counters.
The budget guards the diagnostic mapper against returning to repeated full segment scans.
validated_by: PrimeStruct_misc_tests --test-case="expanded source diagnostic mapper indexes many segment lookups"
